chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1065 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For orders on CMA No.4881/2021 (Ex./A) 3. For hearing of main case 15.08.2023 Syed Zafar Ali Shah, Advocate for the petitioners..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for the petitioners, after arguing at some length, does not press this petition and submits that he will file a Civil Suit for redressal of petitioners’ grievances. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed along with listed application in above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
